title: packera montereyana
intro: Packera montereyana, also known as Western Yarrow or Mountain Fern, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and is a member of the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Packera montereyana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Packera montereyana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
